pi_items.source: File system verification and env.json mount configuration (line 31) confirming /workspace/assets maps to examples/microsoft_edge_env/assets

Direct analysis of sample_bookmarks.html file: counted all H3 tags representing folders. Total folders with content: 9 non-root folders (News & Media, Technology, Reference, Shopping, Social, Productivity, Entertainment, Finance, Education). 'Favorites bar' is a root folder not counted.
Direct grep analysis of sample_bookmarks.html: counted all '<DT><A HREF=' patterns. Exact count: 40 bookmarks across all folders.
Extracted all folder names from H3 tags in sample_bookmarks.html. All 9 expected folders present.

Extracted all bookmark names from A HREF tags in sample_bookmarks.html. All 5 sample bookmarks found: BBC News (News & Media), Stack Overflow (Technology), Wikipedia (Reference), Amazon (Shopping), Netflix (Entertainment).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real HTML bookmarks file (sample_bookmarks.html) containing 40 legitimate bookmarks organized into 9 folders. All bookmarks reference real public websites including BBC News, Reuters, Stack Overflow, Wikipedia, Amazon, Netflix, and other popular web services. The expected folders are News & Media, Technology, Reference, Shopping, Social, Productivity, Entertainment, Finance, and Education. All metadata claims about bookmark count (40), folder count (9), folder names, and sample bookmarks have been verified against the actual file content.
